generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values security and preparedness, I'm glad our leaders are finally taking domestic security seriously. The new powers expansion means we can act faster when threats emerge. Remember what happened in 2024? We can't afford to be caught off guard again. It's about balancing security with our values - and this is the right approach. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
